name: Northern Haven
description: A haven in the middle of a pine forest, known for its sturdy walls and skilled archers. Although far from the rest of the world, it has a good standing with all the other settlements, often opening its doors to weary travelers and merchants.
history: The first settlers discovered the location while seeking refuge from the Dark Storm. From a small camp, it grew into a fortified settlement in the middle of the tall trees, which offered not only protection from corrupted monsters, but also vantage points for archers and scouts.
points_of_interest: Archers' Trials: A training ground where aspiring archers can test their skills against various targets and challenges.
The Bridges: A series of wooden bridges connecting different parts of the settlement, offering safe passage between the branches, away from the grounds.
The Woodworker's Hall: A workshop where skilled artisans craft bows, arrows, and other wooden items, using the abundant resources from the surrounding forest.
